title: Corellian Cafe
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Corellian Cafe''' was a bar on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] located in the [[Corellian Sector (Nar Shaddaa)/Legends|Corellian sector]]. In [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] visited the place when he searched for his old friend [[Mako Spince]] on the Smugglers' [[Moon/Legends|Moon]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''
